text:
On Wed, Jan 31, 2007 at 04:10:31AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I am no longer an active user of RefDB.  I certainly approve the
patch, for what that's worth.  I would be more than happy to hand
maintainership over to Cheng-Lung Sung.
